info.name: text-insert
info.text: He was winning until he made the last mistake.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Life is where you win, until you make the last mistake.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: I don't know how to play that game.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Life has rules, that take a lifetime to learn.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: I'm not sure how much longer I can keep playing this game.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: I'm not sure how much longer I can keep playing this game.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: I'm not sure how much longer I can keep playing this game.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: I'm not sure how much longer I can keep playing this game.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Life is what you have to play, even when you're sure you can't play anymore.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: I'm just trying to level up.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Life is where you level up just by living.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: You can't win every game, but you can learn from your mistakes and try again.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: You can't win every time you try at life, but you can learn from your mistakes and try again.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Life is where the only way you lose, is by not playing anymore.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: I'm going to have to call a time-out.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Life is played without any chance to call a time-out.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: He cheated by using all the power-ups.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Life can't be cheated by using power-ups.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: I've been playing this game for years.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Life can be played for years, without knowing if you're winning or losing.
